data.title: Test gate pre-commit hook times out — compute-diff-hash.sh takes ~8s of 10s budget
data.description: compute-diff-hash.sh takes ~8s, leaving only ~2s for the test gate logic within its 10s timeout. The gtimeout wrapper exits 124 on kill, overriding the test gate's fail-open trap (exit 0). Workaround: use COMPUTE_DIFF_HASH_OVERRIDE with a pre-computed hash. Fix: either increase the test gate timeout to 20s or optimize compute-diff-hash.sh.
